name: pit-wrong-target
notes: Operational pitfall: the gate is pointed at run A (recorded at c1) while the workspace has already moved to c2, where the test now passes. A gate that ignored provenance could emit a spurious pass. The staleness check recomputes the workspace tree immediately before judging and compares it byte-exactly with A.provenance.tree_digest; the mismatch forces inconclusive. The head-side run must execute against the tree being judged -- judging a run whose tree differs from the checkout is non-conforming.
